        /// <summary>Gets a generated shape for the specified type.</summary>
        #nullable disable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        public global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::System.DateTime?> Nullable_DateTime => __Nullable_DateTime ?? __Init_Singleton(ref __Nullable_DateTime, __Create_Nullable_DateTime());
        #nullable enable annotations // Use nullable-oblivious property type
        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::System.DateTime?>? __Nullable_DateTime;

        #pragma warning disable CS8622 // Nullability warning for out parameter mismatch
        private global::PolyType.ITypeShape<global::System.DateTime?> __Create_Nullable_DateTime()
        {
            return new global::PolyType.SourceGenModel.SourceGenOptionalTypeShape<global::System.DateTime?, global::System.DateTime>
            {
                ElementTypeFactory = () => DateTime,
                NoneConstructor = static () => null,
                SomeConstructor = static t => t,
                Deconstructor = static (global::System.DateTime? optional, out global::System.DateTime element) => { if (optional is null) { element = default!; return false; } else { element = optional.Value; return true; } },
                Provider = this,
            };
        }
        #pragma warning restore CS8767
